args.command:
cat > /tmp/claims_STU42.csv <<'EOF'
A,203.0.113.5,malicious,0.9,100
B,203.0.113.5,benign,0.5,90
EOF
awk -F, '{printf " node%s: %s=%s (trust %s)\n",$1,$3,$3,$4}' /tmp/claims_STU42.csv
WIN=$(sort -t, -k4 -rn /tmp/claims_STU42.csv | head -1 | cut -d, -f3)
[ "$WIN" = "malicious" ] && echo "병합 결과: malicious (higher trust)" && echo KNOWLEDGE_SYNCED || echo CHECK

token: ead -1 | cut -d, -f3)\n[ \"$WIN\" = \"malicious\" ] && echo \"병합 결과: malicious (higher trust)\" && e

EOF
awk -F, '\''{printf " node%s: %s=%s (trust %s)\n",$1,$3,$3,$4}'\'' /tmp/claims_STU42.csv
WIN=$(sort -t, -k4 -rn /tmp/claims_STU42.csv | head -1 | cut -d, -f3)
[ "$WIN" = "malicious" ] && echo "병합 결과: malicious (higher trust)" && echo KNOWLEDGE_SYNCED || echo CHECK'
